meaning: n.<德>(纳粹时代的)德国空军
examples: A few dozen had Cousins in the Luftwaffe.
The result of their collaboration was unique among Luftwaffe designs.
He had been made the scapegoat for all the failures of the Luftwaffe.
Within months, the Luftwaffe would duel the Royal Air Force in the Battle of Britain.
Without this breakthrough, the badly outnumbered Royal Air Force would have been no match for the German Luftwaffe.
